title: Comparative prognostic performance of KEYNOTE-564 and AUA risk stratification in nonmetastatic clear cell renal cell carcinoma.
abstract: To compare KEYNOTE-564 and American Urological Association (AUA) risk classifications in clear cell renal cell carcinoma (ccRCC), as recurrence after treatment for localized RCC remains a significant clinical challenge, and no consensus exists on how to define high-risk disease.
